history.text: Unification brought separate territories or communities into a single state framework.
Treaty of Sugauli set new terms for sovereignty or administration.
Nepal–Britain Treaty of 1923 set new terms for sovereignty or administration.
Federal Republic introduced a new form of state rule.
The current constitution came into force, setting the basic framework for today's Nepal.
